curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. Primary location derived from advisory description and patch diff. The advisory explicitly names the file and function. The patch modifies only one source file (NetworkPathMonitor.ts), changing exec() to execFile() with an args array and adding isValidDestination() validation. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — PingMonitor.ts and other monitor types do not use child_process.exec() with user-controlled input. Vulnerability class confirmed as command-injection (CWE-78 maps directly).
